sections.paragraph: adj. only found in fem. הָרָה pregnant, with child, Gen 16:11 38:24 , 25 Gen 38:25 Exo 21:22, etc. [“followed by לְ, by whom”]. הָרָה לָלַת with child, near to be delivered, 1Sa 4:19. הֲרַת עֹולָם always with child, Jer 20:17. Pl. הָרֹות Amo 1:13. With suff. הָרֹותֶיהָ, הָרֹותֵיהֶם (forms which regularly take dagesh, as if from Piel), 2Ki 8:12 15:16 .
